title: Reports
text:
This section collects standalone analysis reports that I have written across statistics, data analysis, and applied coursework.
The reports in the sidebar open as full HTML pages and keep their original formatting. They cover topics including food habits, high school seniors, chi-squared testing, logistic regression, two-way ANOVA, a housing analysis, and weather patterns.

title: Reports
text:
Included reports

Food at College
High School Seniors Analysis
Chi Squared Test
Internship Logistic Regression
Data Science or Computer Science?
Stephanie’s Housing Request
Did Rexburg run out of snow?

title: about me
text:
Hi, I’m Alcuin Abraham, a Data Science major at Brigham Young University - Idaho with a strong interest in building practical systems that help teams work more efficiently and make better decisions.
I enjoy work that sits at the intersection of data, automation, and problem solving. Recent projects and roles have included building AI-assisted internal tools, improving product research workflows, and developing automated data pipelines for university relations. I am especially drawn to problems where good analysis and thoughtful systems design can remove friction and create lasting improvements.
I tend to approach work with initiative, curiosity, and a willingness to learn quickly. Whether I am working on a technical project, improving an internal process, or helping a team get aligned, I care about building solutions that are scalable, reliable, and genuinely useful.

title: about me
text:
What you’ll find here
This portfolio is a place to share the projects, experiments, and skills I am developing across data science, storytelling, machine learning, and full stack work. It reflects both what I am learning and how I like to think through real problems.

title: about me
text:
A little more about me
Beyond coursework and technical projects, I value teamwork, clear communication, and steady growth. My volunteer and professional experience has taught me a lot about leadership, training, and creating systems that support other people well.

title: Full Stack
text: This section highlights a couple of the web projects I have built and shared publicly. They combine product thinking, applied AI, and end-to-end implementation in a way that feels practical and user-focused.

title: Full Stack
text:
Advisor Chat
Created a prototype AI chatbot that utilizes the Gemini embedding model alongside retrieval augmented generation to potentially provide accurate information to international students applying to BYUI.

Open Project

Developed an accent detection scoring website through Microsoft Azure API to network with the founder of onlinejobs.ph, an outsourcing website home to 2M+ Filipino workers.

title: Alcuin Joseph Abraham
text: Data Science Major

title: Alcuin Joseph Abraham
text:
Summary
Young and hungry, passionate about learning and contributing meaningful results within a team. Recognized for taking initiative, learning independently, and offering solutions instead of problems. Skilled at decomposing complex problems, analyzing system-level interactions, and designing solutions for scalability, safety, and maintainability.

title: Alcuin Joseph Abraham
text:
Experience
Oct 2024 - Aug 2025 Amazon Store Manager / Systems Streamlining & AI Integration, SplashNColor

Consolidated two full-time roles into one part-time role through systems, tools, and process optimization, effectively cutting costs by 50% and increasing productivity by 165%.
Created and deployed an AI internal tool that increased weekly product launch efficiency from 10 products to 100.
Established three new product research streams, enhancing discovery methods and strengthening competitive positioning.
Analyzed insights to refine marketing strategy for products, aligning efforts with profitability outcomes.
Developed training materials and operational procedures to expedite onboarding process.

Jan 2026 - Current Systems Integration and Automation, BYUI University Relations

Owned end-to-end design of scalable transactional email infrastructure; researched platforms, defined architecture, and deployed production-ready systems without requiring micromanagement.
Replacing manual Excel workflows with an automated SFTP ingestion pipeline in Python (pandas) for CRM-bound prospective student data.
Enforcing schema and engineering safe file handling, and data validation for reliable processing.
Created standard operation procedures, documented edge cases, and created training for future scaling and maintenance.
